plugins.name: spanner-security
plugins.description: Spanner PD's secure-by-default engineering standard — GitHub, Supabase, and Cloudflare rules plus the three-layer compliance framework. Applies automatically when building or reviewing anything touching code, data, auth, or deployment.

plugins.name: spanner-toolkit
plugins.description: Spanner's working skill set for Claude Code — project setup, SpannerOS schema migrations and CRUD scaffolding, Torque product-UI language, design-review loop, operating model, internal-portal deploy, domain/SSL/DNS, weekly digest, and matrix task sync. Brings terminal Claude Code to parity with the org skill library.
